pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 8: VIP_LIST_FILE="$DOCS_DIR/vip_list.txt" where DOCS_DIR=/home/ga/Documents. Task description also references ~/Documents/vip_list.txt.

Task description explicitly states: 'Create a new folder in BlueMail named VIP-Accounts'. Verifier confirms folder name. Internally stored as .VIP-Accounts in Maildir format, but displayed to users as VIP-Accounts.
Task description: 'Draft an email to director@company.com'. Verifier.py line 99 checks for target_recipient = "director@company.com".
Task description specifies report subject as 'VIP Account Status Update', which contains the keyword 'VIP'. Verifier checks that subject lines of VIP emails are included in the report body.

privileged_info_summary: The task instructs an account manager to isolate emails from VIP senders into a dedicated folder and report to director@company.com. The VIP email list is dynamically generated from 3 random senders out of 41 unique senders in the SpamAssassin ham corpus (50 total emails). The task verifies folder creation (VIP-Accounts), email isolation precision and recall, draft email creation to director@company.com with subject containing 'VIP', and includes email subject lines in the report body.
